intended_use: Standalone diagnostic bioimaging software is intended to measure and visualize cardiovascular structures.
intended_use_full: Standalone diagnostic bioimaging software is intended to measure and visualize cardiovascular structures.
target_condition: Cardiovascular conditions requiring pre-operative planning, post-operative evaluation, coronary artery assessment, and calcium scoring
ground_truth: Manual expert segmentation and measurements obtained by experts using the predicate device
other_metrics: Dice coefficient (mitral annulus 0.94 ± 0.07, tricuspid annulus 0.87 ± 0.12); ICC (aortic annulus 0.99, mitral annulus 0.94 and above, tricuspid annulus 0.97 and above); average distance from automatically detected nadir positions -0.64 ± 1.07 mm
